progress_description: You've completed almost all of your modules!
review_committee: Our review committee is available for feedback.
advanced_web_desc: Comprehensive training in modern web technologies, microservices, and cloud architecture deployment.
data_science_desc: Learn data analysis, statistical modeling, and machine learning algorithms with Python and TensorFlow.
about_program_text: Throughout this intensive 3-month program, you'll build production-ready applications, implement microservices architectures, and deploy scalable solutions using industry-standard DevOps practices. Our curriculum is carefully crafted to bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and practical application.
learn_1: Build full-stack applications using React, Node.js, and MongoDB
learn_2: Deploy applications on AWS cloud infrastructure
learn_3: Apply advanced design patterns and software architecture
learn_4: Design and implement RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints
learn_5: Implement CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment
req_1: Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
req_3: Experience with Git and Version Control
chat_advisor_text: Talk to our academic advisor about this program.
task_details: Design and implement a RESTful API for a task management system using Express.js and PostgreSQL. Your API should include proper authentication, validation, and error handling.

review_text: Exceptional performance throughout the program. Sarah demonstrated outstanding technical skills, particularly in React architecture and cloud deployment. Her final project showcased advanced understanding of microservices patterns and modern DevOps practices.

react_hooks_description: Complete the exercises on useState, useEffect, and custom hooks.
redux_quiz_description: Multiple choice quiz covering Redux Toolkit and Context API.
graphql_quiz_desc: Quiz covering GraphQL basics, queries, and mutations.
nextjs_project_desc: Build a full-featured blog using Next.js 14 with App Router.
rest_api_desc: Design and implement a RESTful API using Express.js.
